body:
Hi Charles,

Thanks for the details on your mother Dorothy. Based on the initial profile, our preliminary quote for the long-term care policy comes to 3,150.00 per year for the 4,500 monthly benefit with a 90-day elimination period and a 3-year benefit window. This is preliminary and subject to underwriting review.

Regards,
Paul Hensley
Hensley Senior Care Insurance
snippet: Based on the initial profile, our preliminary quote comes to 3,150.00 per year for the 4,500 monthly benefit...
subject: Preliminary LTC quote for Dorothy Ferguson

body:
Hi Charles,

Underwriting has completed its review and I am revising our earlier figure. The final quote for the same 4,500 monthly benefit, 90-day elimination period, and 3-year benefit window is 2,880.00 per year. This supersedes the preliminary number I sent and is valid for 30 days.

Regards,
Paul Hensley
Hensley Senior Care Insurance
snippet: Underwriting completed its review and I am revising our earlier figure. The final quote is 2,880.00 per year...
subject: Re: Preliminary LTC quote for Dorothy Ferguson

body:
Hi Charles,

Good news on the initial pass. My first estimate for Dorothy's coverage is 2,600.00 per year for a 4,000 monthly benefit with a 90-day elimination period. I will confirm once underwriting signs off.

Best,
Diane Whitfield
Whitfield Long-Term Care Group
snippet: My first estimate for Dorothy's coverage is 2,600.00 per year for a 4,000 monthly benefit...
subject: LTC estimate for your mother

body:
Hi Charles,

I have to walk back my earlier number. After underwriting reviewed the medical history, the revised annual premium for the 4,000 monthly benefit is 3,400.00 per year, not the 2,600.00 I first quoted. I am sorry for the change. This revised figure is the one that stands.

Best,
Diane Whitfield
Whitfield Long-Term Care Group
snippet: After underwriting reviewed the medical history, the revised annual premium is 3,400.00 per year, not the 2,600.00 I first quoted...
subject: Re: LTC estimate for your mother

body:
Hi Charles,

Confirming the parcel figures you asked about. The annual property tax on the Crestwood home at 1892 Crestwood Ln is 4,200.00 for the current cycle per the county treasurer record. Any older statement showing 5,400.00 was from a prior reassessment that was corrected.

Regards,
Ted Morrison
Morrison Tax Services
snippet: The annual property tax on the Crestwood home at 1892 Crestwood Ln is 4,200.00 for the current cycle...
